title: S.A.M Item / Weapon
description: Defines a custom item or weapon. S.A.M registers it into the items[] table at a reserved runtime slot (>=5000) and wires up its names, category, slot, weight, value, level, attributes and 2D inventory icon. Custom 3D models and on-hit effects are PLANNED and not yet loaded — see each field's note.

$schema.description: Optional. URL of this JSON Schema, so editors give autocomplete + validation as you type. Ignored by S.A.M itself.

id.description: Unique item id in 'namespace:item' form (e.g. 'darkblade:shadowblade'). S.A.M assigns the runtime numeric item slot (>=5000) automatically.

name_unidentified.description: Item name shown before identification (e.g. 'black sword').

category.description: Item category (Barony Category enum, from items.hpp). Governs how the game classifies the item.

slot.description: Equipment slot the item occupies (Barony ItemEquippableSlot enum). Use NO_EQUIP for non-equippable items.

weight.description: Item weight in Barony weight units.

gold_value.description: Base gold value of the item.

level.description: Item level for random-generation curves. -1 excludes the item from random generation.

model.description: PLANNED — not yet loaded by the framework. Path (relative to the mod folder) to the third-person/world .vox model. Custom items currently use a placeholder model cloned from a similar vanilla item; setting this has no visual effect yet.

model_fp.description: PLANNED — not yet loaded by the framework. Path to the first-person .vox model the wielder sees. No visual effect yet (see 'model').

icon.description: Path (relative to the mod folder) to a PNG used as the item's 2D inventory/hotbar icon, e.g. 'items/shadowblade.png'. Loaded at runtime and drawn like the class-select portrait. If the file is missing, a placeholder icon cloned from a similar vanilla item is used. (Only the 2D icon is loaded — the 3D 'model'/'model_fp' are still planned.)

attributes.description: Named integer attributes/effects for the item (maps to ItemGeneric.attributes). Keys are attribute names, values are integers.

on_hit_effect.description: PLANNED — requires the S.A.M effect/plugin system, which is not yet implemented. Parsed but has no runtime effect. Status effect to apply on a successful hit (e.g. an EFF_ effect name from stat.hpp).

on_hit_chance.description: PLANNED — no runtime effect yet (see 'on_hit_effect'). Probability (0.0-1.0) that on_hit_effect triggers on a hit.

stackable.description: PLANNED — parsed but not yet applied at runtime. Whether multiple copies stack into one inventory slot.

magic_level.description: PLANNED — parsed but not yet applied at runtime. Magic/enchantment level of the item.
